case_title: SEYEDEH SHIRIN MOADEL SHAHIDI VS. MEHREGAN PEZESHKI KHORASANI

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-30-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SEYEDEH SHAHIDI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOADEL SHAHIDI, SEYEDEH SHIRIN AS TO DEFENDANT PEZESHKI KHORASANI, MEHREGAN CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-18-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPIES OF SC-100 CLAIM MAILED TO PLAINTIFF AFTER RE-SET OF HEARING DATE. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-18-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-30-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MOADEL SHAHIDI, SEYEDEH SHIRIN AS TO DEFENDANT PEZESHKI KHORASANI, MEHREGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - SEYEDEH SHIRIN MOADEL SHAHIDI; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER)
(SC-150) REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOADEL SHAHIDI, SEYEDEH SHIRIN
